rows.Event Name: Free Wellness On The Green Event
rows.Event Description: Wellness on the Lawn! April 25, 9AM–12PM | FREE Fitness classes, cold plunge, sauna, mimosas, IV bar & giveaways. Free + family-friendly Join us at Desert Ridge Marketplace for the Wellness on the Green Wellness Event on the AMC Lawn from 9AM-12PM for a morning of wellness, movement, and relaxation. Experience multiple FREE fitness classes, including classes from Reformed Pilates, PVOLVE( Jennifer Anisten's fitness company), refresh in our cold plunge and sauna, sip mimosas at our mobile Sip & Stroll bar, and boost your energy at the on-site IV station. Plus, enjoy giveaways, wellness-inspired surprises, and more as you recharge. This free, family-friendly event is the perfect way to glow, flow, and feel your best – don’t miss it!

rows.Event Name: Score Love Singles Mixer | Mini Golf + Dating at Puttshack Scottsdale
rows.Event Description: Get ready to mix fun and flirtation over some epic mini golf battles and good vibes. Score Love is the dating show that started on a golf course — and now we're bringing that magic to you. Born from the belief that real connections happen IRL, Score Love is on a mission to get singles off the apps and into the same room (or in this case, the same course). On This is a Score Love events are part of an ongoing content series, so don't be surprised if you end up on camera. 😉 Follow Spots are limited and this one will sell out.

From the bassist of the Grammy-nominated band the Avett Brothers, Bob Crawford presents his book, America's Founding Son. During the tumultuous period between the era of the Founding Fathers and the disunion of the Civil War, John Quincy Adams was the man standing in the breach. After an unsuccessful presidential reelection campaign, he was left reckoning with his political legacy. But Adams would be dragged back into the fray in ways he never expected, pitting him against the slavocracy and Southern congressmen and solidifying him as a key ally to the antislavery cause. Following the events of The Rendezvous(2025), Luke and his new FBI allies team up to take down three notorious criminals. The Rendezvous (2025) premiered in April 28th Now the anticipated sequel arrived written, directed, and starring Fernando Lopez. Also starring Rachel Pizzolato(Once Upon a Dream) Aaron Vargas(The Postmaster) and introducing Tom Ashman(Ashmanathletics). It's the most action packed indie film based out of Arizona and into Los Angeles.

Get ready to sip mint juleps, wear big hats, and cheer on the horses at our Kentucky Derby Porch Party! Join us as we celebrate the 152nd running of the Kentucky Derby in true Southern style. Experience multiple viewing screens, a live DJ, handcrafted cocktails, and a lively atmosphere, all in celebration of the fastest two minutes in sports! Eventbrite ticket price of $225 includes 20% gratuity and 9.1% tax.
